scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.verify: node --import tsx server/src/app.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/authPolicy.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/config.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/mimo.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/mimoSupervisor.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/status.test.mjs && node --import tsx server/src/workspacePolicy.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/stores/appReducers.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/components/chat/messageAttachments.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/components/chat/modelRouting.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/components/chat/sessionSource.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/components/chat/slashCommands.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/lib/messageOrder.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/lib/streamingDisplay.test.mjs && node --import tsx web/src/lib/time.test.mjs && npm run typecheck && npm run build
